goal: Run the heterogeneous-pool experiment and exhaust all possibility of positive competency lift
pool: 12 specimens: 8 Haiku (c1-c8) + 2 Sonnet (s1,s2) + 2 Opus (o1,o2), all blind, cron contract
literal_control: PASS — judge re-ranks WITHIN the sealed-indifferent set to a functionally-better specimen (o2, full_truth 1.0) the numeric signal cannot prefer (sealed-tied). By the advisor's literal criterion this is the thing that counts.
BUT_confounds: NOT a meta-loop improvement: the judge is part of the DEFAULT harness (F7 stage-2), not an evolved gene. The meta-loop did nothing here; this is the existing two-stage harness working.

APPEARANCE-confounded: the judges cite thoroughness cues (day-level jumping, DOW=7 normalization, regex validation, Vixie OR) — the SAME rigor heuristic that picked c4 on the homogeneous pool. Here the most-thorough-looking specimen (Opus o2) HAPPENS to also be truth-best, so the heuristic accidentally aligns with truth.

NOT robust — the divergence control reverses it: on the homogeneous Haiku pool, truth-best (c5, functional 43/43) does NOT look most thorough, and the judge shipped c4 (0.9643) < numeric baseline 0.9732. So when appearance and truth DIVERGE, the judge tracks APPEARANCE, not truth.

Strong-model confound (the advisor's named risk): the 'win' = the Opus specimen, which is most-correct AND most-impressive. This is 'Opus beats Haiku + judge prefers Opus-style', a POOL effect, not 'harness selection detects correctness'.
exhaustive_verdict: A naive positive EXISTS (hetero + judge ships the truth-best o2, +0.0214, unanimous, passes the literal re-rank control). But it is NOT a robust, attributable competency lift: (1) it is the default harness's judge stage, not meta-loop self-improvement; (2) it is appearance-confounded — the judge tracks visible thoroughness, which coincides with truth only because a strong model wrote the best AND most-impressive specimen; (3) the divergence control (homogeneous c5-vs-c4) is NEGATIVE, proving the judge follows appearance not correctness. Competency lift attributable to harness self-improvement: NOT earned. The apparent positive collapses to a strong-model-in-pool + judge-likes-rigor correlation that reverses when appearance != truth.
what_would_be_a_clean_positive: A pool where the truth-best specimen looks LESS impressive than a truth-worse one, AND the harness ships the truth-best anyway. The homogeneous c5-vs-c4 case IS that test, and it is negative. No configuration tested ships a truth-best that does not also look best.
